# BargainBot Deal Report: Apple AirPods Pro 2nd Generation
## 🎯 Product Summary
The Apple AirPods Pro 2nd Generation is a high-end wireless earbuds product from Apple, known for its advanced noise cancellation and high-quality sound. The typical price range for this product is between $150 to $250.

2. **Amazon**: $213.11 - [https://amazon.com](https://amazon.com) - Score: 6 - Estimated Savings: $35.89
3. **Walmart**: $234.08 - [https://walmart.com](https://walmart.com) - Score: 5 - Estimated Savings: $14.92

## 💰 Best Buy Recommendation
The best deal for the Apple AirPods Pro 2nd Generation is the one offered by **BestBuy** for $155.94. This deal offers the lowest price among all retailers, with an estimated savings of $93.06, making it the most attractive option for consumers.

## ⚠️ Watch Out For
When shopping for the Apple AirPods Pro 2nd Generation, be cautious of prices above $230, as they may indicate a bad deal. Additionally, be aware of any prices that seem significantly lower than the average price range, as they may be indicative of a scam or a used/refurbished product.

## 📊 Price Range Analysis
Based on the data, the minimum price found is $155.94 (BestBuy), the maximum price is $234.08 (Walmart), and the average price is $201.04. This analysis suggests that the best deals are likely to be found at prices below $160, while prices above $230 may not be the best value for consumers.
